body_txt: In a group of characters with Theme Naming , sometimes one just doesn't fit the pattern. To the viewer, this is about as subtle as placing a big, blinking neon sign saying "HEY, LOOK! THIS GUY'S IMPORTANT!" above their head even before the character has a chance to do anything, and whether or not they really are important is a matter of debate. For some reason, this character tends to be named Bob, due to the inherent hilarity of the name "Bob". He may also be a Special Person, Normal Name . Sometimes identifies The Runt at the End . Can also apply to a lapse in Idiosyncratic Episode Naming . Compare Aerith and Bob , Tom the Dark Lord , Uniformity Exception . Often occurs with Famous, Famous, Fictional .
